name: vscode-react-pug-tsx
description: JSX-grade IntelliSense for pug`` tagged template literals in React projects

pugReact.enabled.description: Enable/disable the Pug React IntelliSense extension

pugReact.tagFunction.description: The tag function name to recognize (for users who alias the import)

enumDescriptions: Never inject cssxjs React attribute types.
Inject cssxjs React attribute types only when the current file contains "startupjs" or "cssxjs".
Always inject cssxjs React attribute types for TS/TSX files with pug templates.
pugReact.injectCssxjsTypes.description: Controls automatic injection of cssxjs React attribute types (part/styleName).

enumDescriptions: Use className by default; switch to styleName when startupjs/cssxjs is detected.
Always compile shorthand classes into className.
Always compile shorthand classes into class.
Always compile shorthand classes into styleName.
pugReact.classShorthandProperty.description: Controls which attribute receives shorthand classes such as .title.

enumDescriptions: Use classnames-style array merge for styleName, otherwise string concatenation.
Merge shorthand with explicit value using string concatenation.
Merge shorthand with explicit value using classnames-compatible arrays.
pugReact.classShorthandMerge.description: Controls how shorthand classes are merged with an explicit class attribute value.

pugReact.requirePugImport.description: When enabled, files using the configured pug tag must explicitly import it.

pugReact.componentPathFromUppercaseClass.description: When enabled, uppercase dot segments after a component name are treated as component path parts (for example Modal.Header.active => component Modal.Header with class .active).
